title: pelargonium × jeschekianum
intro: Pelargonium × jeschekianum, also known as the Rose Geranium, is a hybrid plant species of the genus Pelargonium, native to South Africa. The medicinal properties of this plant are attributed to its essential oil, which contains compounds like linalool and geraniol, providing antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Rose Geranium include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep, and alleviating symptoms of menstrual cramps and menopausal hot flashes. Rose Geranium can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, essential oils, and tinctures, which are often used to promote relaxation and balance in the body.
